subcodes.first_line: O thou who art the wooer of the Beloved the Regions! As soon as the Sun of Truth dawned in the East of Eternity, its rays like unto the lightening
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مفتون دلبر آفاق شمس حقیقت بمحض اشراق انوارش مانند بارقه سحری این فضای وسیع
subcodes.subjects: @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @light and darkness, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
